zh.lifeSummary: 當John Harewell於1347年出生在英國瓦維其可爾伍頓 瓦文時，他的父親Roger Harewell27歲，母親Maud de Stanford22歲。他和Margaret Beaupine至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1428年在他的家鄉享年81歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾伍頓 瓦文。

nameMeanings.name: Harewell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English phrase fare wel ‘do well, prosper’, or perhaps from the saluation fare wel ‘farewell, goodbye’.

variants.name: Farwell
meanings: nickname from the Middle English phrase fare wel ‘do well, prosper’, or perhaps from the saluation fare wel ‘farewell, goodbye’. Compare Farewell 2.
habitational name from Farewell, Staffordshire, or another place so named (from Old English fæger ‘pleasant’ + wella ‘spring, stream’).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Harewell was born in 1347, in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, England, his father, Roger Harewell, was 27 and his mother, Maud de Stanford, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Beaupine. He died in 1428, in his hometown, at the age of 81, and was buried in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Harewell est né en 1347, à Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Harewell, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maud de Stanford, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Beaupine. Il est décédé en 1428, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Harewell 1347 in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Harewell 27 und seine Mutter Maud de Stanford 22. Er hatte mit Margaret Beaupine mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1428 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Beaupine. Morì nel 1428, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Harewellが1347年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウットオン ワウンで生まれた時，父Roger Harewellは27歳，母Maud de Stanfordは22歳であった。彼はMargaret Beaupineとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1428年に故郷で81歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウットオン ワウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Harewell(이)가 1347년 영국 워윅실르 보턴 와웬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Harewell(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Stanford(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Margaret Beaupine(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 보턴 와웬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Harewell nasceu em 1347, em Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Harewell, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Stanford, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Beaupine. Ele faleceu em 1428, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Harewell родился в 1347 г. в местности вуттон вавен, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Harewell было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Stanford, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Margaret Beaupine. Он умер в 1428 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности вуттон вавен, варвиккшир, Англия.
